RugSolScanner
AboutAPI
On-chain security analysis

Understand the risk
before you trade

RugSol analyzes Solana tokens in real-time, running 8+ independent security checks to produce a risk score from 0 to 100. No sign-up required — full scanning and scoring is available without creating an account or logging in.

How it works

Paste a token address and get a comprehensive report in seconds.

01

Enter address

Paste any Solana token mint address or Pump.fun token.

02

On-chain scan

We run parallel checks against the blockchain, Jupiter, DexScreener, and more.

03

Get your score

Receive a 0-100 risk score, letter grade, and detailed breakdown of every finding.

Security checks

Every scan runs these checks in parallel. Failed checks are flagged but never crash the report.

Authority Analysis

Detects active mint and freeze authorities that could be exploited to print tokens or freeze wallets.

Holder Distribution

Analyzes top 10 holders, concentration risk, and identifies wallet types to flag insider accumulation.

Honeypot Detection

Simulates a sell transaction via Jupiter to verify that holders can actually sell their tokens.

Liquidity Analysis

Checks DEX pool sizes, LP lock/burn status, or Pump.fun bonding curve progress depending on platform.

Sniper & Bundle Detection

Identifies wallets that bought in the same block as deployment and detects coordinated Jito bundles.

Dev Wallet Tracking

Tracks the deployer wallet balance and sell activity to detect insider dumps and linked wallet clusters.

Scoring system

Tokens start at 100 points. Each risk factor deducts points. Critical failures like honeypot detection or active mint authority result in an automatic F grade.

A
80 — 100
Safe
B
60 — 79
Low Risk
C
40 — 59
Moderate Risk
D
20 — 39
High Risk
F
0 — 19
Likely Scam

Platform support

The scanner auto-detects the token platform and adjusts checks accordingly.

DEX Tokens

  • -Full liquidity pool analysis
  • -LP lock & burn verification
  • -Authority & metadata checks
  • -Mutable metadata flagged as risk

Pump.fun Tokens

  • -Bonding curve progress tracking
  • -LP check replaced with curve state
  • -Metadata mutability expected
  • -Migration status detection

Integrations

Use RugSol programmatically or get alerts in Telegram.

Public API

POST to /api/scan with a token address to get a full security report as JSON.

No API key required for basic usage.

Telegram Bot

Scan tokens directly from Telegram with inline commands. Get instant alerts for your groups.

Add the bot to any group for real-time monitoring.

Ready to check a token?

Paste any Solana token address and get an instant security report.

Start scanning

Built on Solana

RugSol provides on-chain security analysis for informational purposes only. Nothing on this platform constitutes financial, investment, legal, or tax advice. Token scores and risk assessments are algorithmically generated and should not be the sole basis for any investment decision. Always do your own research (DYOR). Past detection performance does not guarantee future results. By using RugSol, you agree to our Terms of Service and acknowledge the inherent risks of cryptocurrency trading.
